items.q: The character Don Draper appears in Fleabag.
items.explanation: Don Draper appears in Mad Men, not Fleabag.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show Derry Girls?
items.explanation: Erin Quinn is one of the defining characters in Derry Girls.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show The Sopranos?
items.explanation: Tony Soprano is one of the defining characters in The Sopranos.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Raylan Givens.
items.explanation: Raylan Givens is strongly linked to Justified.

items.q: The character Liz Lemon appears in 30 Rock.
items.explanation: Liz Lemon is a key character in 30 Rock.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show The Handmaids Tale?
items.explanation: June Osborne is one of the defining characters in The Handmaids Tale.

items.q: Which tv show features the character Seth Bullock?
items.explanation: Seth Bullock is associated with Deadwood.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Seong Gi-hun.
items.explanation: Seong Gi-hun is strongly linked to Squid Game.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show The Leftovers?
items.explanation: Kevin Garvey is one of the defining characters in The Leftovers.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Uhtred.
items.explanation: Uhtred is strongly linked to The Last Kingdom.
